name: streaming-data-rows
title: Streaming Data Rows
description: A live operational table your app drives: animated row insertion, update, resort with continuity, per-cell change emphasis (arrow glyph, never color alone), numeric morphs, and status transitions. Loading, empty, and error states; sortable headers with aria-sort; rate-limited screen-reader summaries; reduced-motion instant swaps. Not a data-grid — for live subsets.
